text:
Once upon a time in a small island village lived a gentle cat named Whiskers. Whiskers loved sleeping curled up on comfy straw cushions by their favorite little window looking out at the sparkling sea.

One day, while lazily meowing contentedly, Whiskers heard something unusual. Far out at sea, a pirate ship was chasing a flock of beautiful flamingoes. The brave flamingoes flew higher and higher, searching for safer waters.

WhiskERS wants?!

With a leap onto a fallen sailcone, the cat darted after them. He chased them across sands golden like wheat grains tumbling from an autumn wind.

They swooped down into a tranquil wetland oasis. Flamingoes splashed circles in a quiet patterns on the muddy ground.

Back again next morning?

The daring pirates had vanished... overnight.

Whiskers snuck around the edge of this lush place. But what was this? A small forest surrounded by tall oak trees.
